scripts.build: npm run build -w @optivem/commons && npm run build -w @optivem/optivem-testing && npm run build -w @optivem/driver-api && npm run build -w @optivem/driver-common && npm run build -w @optivem/driver-core && npm run build -w @optivem/dsl-api && npm run build -w @optivem/dsl-common && npm run build -w @optivem/dsl-core && npm run build -w @optivem/test-infrastructure
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test -w acceptance-test && npm run test -w smoke-test && npm run test -w e2e-test && npm run test -w external-system-contract-test
